scripts.build: UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.uv-cache uv run --package elephant-calculator-api python -m compileall src
scripts.dev: UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.uv-cache uv run --package elephant-calculator-api uvicorn elephant_calculator_api.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.dev:reload: UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.uv-cache uv run --package elephant-calculator-api uvicorn elephant_calculator_api.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.generate: UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.uv-cache uv run --package elephant-calculator-api python -m elephant_calculator_api.export_openapi openapi.json
scripts.lint: UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.uv-cache uv run --package elephant-calculator-api python -m compileall src
scripts.test: UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.uv-cache uv run --package elephant-calculator-api pytest tests
